title: حرف الدال

items.activity: teachCard — stroke-order card with directional arrows and red start dot
colorLetter — help the girl color letter د among letter bubbles
teachCard — picture (lion) + word; د in medial/final position
teachCard — picture (hen) + word; د in initial position (red)
teachCard — picture (worm) + word; د initial and medial
teachCard — picture (monkey) + word; د in final position (red)

notes: 18 images, all viewed. Primary worksheetType=traceLetter (dominant trace/write activity); mix of teach cards, coloring, find-the-letter, circle-the-letter, and short-vowel writing (دَ/دُ/دِ). Letter forms shown: isolated د and connected final form (ـد) in m014. Word forms span initial (دجاجة, دودة, دب, دراجة), medial (أسد), and final (قرد, صياد) positions. Letter ذ does NOT appear (only د). Teachers credited: Kaoutar/Kawthar, Abu Bakr Seddik school. No full sentences present. Arabic read by sight from images. Words دائرة and ديناصور appear only as small inline reading-row items (medium confidence on full diacritics). .wdp/.wmf: none present in folder.
